plugins.name: anti-vibe-coding
plugins.description: Plugin de desenvolvimento disciplinado com conhecimentos de programador senior. v7.0.0 — init-refactor-v7: populate-plan-andre-port. Porta a estrutura de populate-plan do harness do Andre para /init. PLAN.md.tpl com 11 secoes (Goal/Scope/Assumptions/Risks/Execution Steps/Review Checklist/Validation Log/Compound Opportunity/Lessons Captured/Exit Criteria/Observability) + fase.md.tpl + LLM_INSTRUCTIONS imperativas (Fontes/Secoes/Honestidade) + discovery (stack-id, doc-canonico) -> paths em 6 stacks. Gate 'nunca diminuir' via parity test + golden snapshot + audit log expandido (docsCoveredByStack/docsWithoutCodeEvidence/phasesCreatedVsExpected). Bug fix: 90-final-validation gate path drift (init abortava em greenfield ha 7 semanas). Saneamento total: 0 fails, 0 erros TS, harness:validate exit 0.
